mapper.sql: t.id AS id, t.task_name AS taskName, t.status AS status, t.description AS description, t.dataset_id AS datasetId, d.name AS datasetName, t.dataset_version_id AS datasetVersionId, v.version_no AS datasetVersionNo, CASE WHEN v.version_no = 0 THEN '草稿' ELSE CONCAT('V', v.version_no) END AS datasetVersionName, t.item_count AS itemCount, t.app_type AS appType, t.app_id AS appId, t.app_version_id AS appVersionId, t.started_at AS startedAt, t.finished_at AS finishedAt, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM eval_task t JOIN eval_dataset d ON t.dataset_id = d.id JOIN eval_dataset_version v ON t.dataset_version_id = v.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND (#{status} IS NULL OR #{status} = '' OR t.status = #{status}) AND (#{like} = '%%' OR t.task_name LIKE #{like}) ORDER BY ${orderColumn} ${orderDirection} LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eval_task t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND (#{status} IS NULL OR #{status} = '' OR t.status = #{status}) AND (#{like} = '%%' OR t.task_name LIKE #{like})
SELECT FROM eval_task t JOIN eval_dataset d ON t.dataset_id = d.id JOIN eval_dataset_version v ON t.dataset_version_id = v.id WHERE t.id = #{taskId} AND t.is_deleted = 0

SELECT te.id AS taskEvaluatorId, te.evaluator_source AS evaluatorSource, te.evaluator_id AS evaluatorId, te.evaluator_version_id AS evaluatorVersionId, CASE WHEN te.evaluator_source = 'preset' THEN p.evaluator_name ELSE e.evaluator_name END AS evaluatorName, CASE WHEN te.evaluator_source = 'preset' THEN p.evaluator_type ELSE e.evaluator_type END AS evaluatorType, CASE WHEN te.evaluator_source = 'preset' THEN '预置' WHEN ev.version_no = 0 THEN '草稿' ELSE CONCAT('V', ev.version_no) END AS versionName, te.status AS status, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.pass_result = 'pass' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS passCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completedCount, COUNT(r.id) AS totalCount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.pass_result = 'pass' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) END AS passRate, te.display_order AS displayOrder FROM eval_task_evaluator te LEFT JOIN eval_preset_evaluator p ON te.evaluator_source = 'preset' AND te.evaluator_id = p.id LEFT JOIN eval_evaluator e ON te.evaluator_source = 'custom' AND te.evaluator_id = e.id LEFT JOIN eval_evaluator_version ev ON te.evaluator_version_id = ev.id LEFT JOIN eval_task_evaluator_result r ON r.task_evaluator_id = te.id WHERE te.task_id = #{taskId} GROUP BY te.id, te.evaluator_source, te.evaluator_id, te.evaluator_version_id, p.evaluator_name, p.evaluator_type, e.evaluator_name, e.evaluator_type, ev.version_no, te.status, te.display_order ORDER BY te.display_order ASC

SELECT tt.id AS taskTagId, tt.tag_id AS tagId, tag.tag_name AS tagName, tag.tag_type AS tagType, tt.status AS status, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.pass_result = 'pass' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS passCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completedCount, COUNT(r.id) AS totalCount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.pass_result = 'pass' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) END AS passRate, tt.display_order AS displayOrder FROM eval_task_tag tt JOIN eval_tag tag ON tt.tag_id = tag.id LEFT JOIN eval_task_tag_result r ON r.task_tag_id = tt.id WHERE tt.task_id = #{taskId} GROUP BY tt.id, tt.tag_id, tag.tag_name, tag.tag_type, tt.status, tt.display_order ORDER BY tt.display_order ASC

SELECT id AS id, task_id AS taskId, dataset_version_id AS datasetVersionId, dataset_item_id AS datasetItemId, row_no AS rowNo, status AS status, app_output AS appOutput, app_output_status AS appOutputStatus, app_error_message AS appErrorMessage, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_task_item WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY row_no ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id AS id, task_id AS taskId, dataset_version_id AS datasetVersionId, dataset_item_id AS datasetItemId, row_no AS rowNo, status AS status, app_output AS appOutput, app_output_status AS appOutputStatus, app_error_message AS appErrorMessage, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_task_item WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY row_no ASC

SELECT id AS id, task_id AS taskId, dataset_version_id AS datasetVersionId, dataset_item_id AS datasetItemId, row_no AS rowNo, status AS status, app_output AS appOutput, app_output_status AS appOutputStatus, app_error_message AS appErrorMessage, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_task_item WHERE id = #{taskItemId}

SELECT id AS id, task_id AS taskId, app_input_id AS appInputId, app_input_name AS appInputName, app_input_type AS appInputType, dataset_version_id AS datasetVersionId, dataset_field_id AS datasetFieldId, display_order AS displayOrder FROM eval_task_app_field_mapping WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY display_order ASC

SELECT id AS id, task_id AS taskId, evaluator_source AS evaluatorSource, evaluator_id AS evaluatorId, evaluator_version_id AS evaluatorVersionId, status AS status, display_order AS displayOrder FROM eval_task_evaluator WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY display_order ASC

SELECT id AS id, task_id AS taskId, task_evaluator_id AS taskEvaluatorId, param_id AS paramId, param_name AS paramName, source_type AS sourceType, dataset_version_id AS datasetVersionId, dataset_field_id AS datasetFieldId, app_output_name AS appOutputName, display_order AS displayOrder FROM eval_task_evaluator_param_mapping WHERE task_evaluator_id = #{taskEvaluatorId} ORDER BY display_order ASC

SELECT id AS id, task_id AS taskId, task_evaluator_id AS taskEvaluatorId, param_id AS paramId, param_name AS paramName, source_type AS sourceType, dataset_version_id AS datasetVersionId, dataset_field_id AS datasetFieldId, app_output_name AS appOutputName, display_order AS displayOrder FROM eval_task_evaluator_param_mapping WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY task_evaluator_id ASC, display_order ASC

SELECT tt.id AS id, tt.task_id AS taskId, tt.tag_id AS tagId, tag.tag_name AS tagName, tag.tag_type AS tagType, tag.description AS description, tag.min_value AS `minValue`, tag.max_value AS `maxValue`, tag.pass_threshold AS `passThreshold`, tt.status AS status, tt.display_order AS displayOrder FROM eval_task_tag tt JOIN eval_tag tag ON tt.tag_id = tag.id WHERE tt.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY tt.display_order ASC
